languages.text: "Да восславится Бог-Император, Омниссия, единый на Терре и Марсе".
"Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."
languages.original_text: "Да восславится Бог-Император, Омниссия, единый на Терре и Марсе".

traits.locale_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."
"Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."
"Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

languages.text: «Gloria al Dios Emperador y al Omnissiah, unidos en Terra y Marte».
languages.original_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

traits.locale_text: «Gloria al Dios Emperador y al Omnissiah, unidos en Terra y Marte».

languages.text: “荣耀归于神皇与欧姆尼赛亚，泰拉和火星同心同德。”
languages.original_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

traits.locale_text: “荣耀归于神皇与欧姆尼赛亚，泰拉和火星同心同德。”

languages.text: « Gloire à l'Empereur-Dieu et à l'Omnimessie, unis sur Terra comme sur Mars. »
languages.original_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

traits.locale_text: « Gloire à l'Empereur-Dieu et à l'Omnimessie, unis sur Terra comme sur Mars. »

languages.text: "Terra ve Mars'ta birlik içinde olan Tanrı İmparator'a ve Hermesih'e şükürler olsun."
languages.original_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

traits.locale_text: "Terra ve Mars'ta birlik içinde olan Tanrı İmparator'a ve Hermesih'e şükürler olsun."

languages.text: "Gepriesen seien der Gottimperator und der Omnissiah in der Zweifaltigkeit von Erde und Mars."
languages.original_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

traits.locale_text: "Gepriesen seien der Gottimperator und der Omnissiah in der Zweifaltigkeit von Erde und Mars."

languages.text: 「神皇帝と全知神に栄光あれ。地球と火星で団結して。」
languages.original_text: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝と全知神に栄光あれ。地球と火星で団結して。」
